name: Sundy Service Group Co. Ltd
summary: Sundy Service Group Co. Ltd operates as an integrated property management service provider in the property management industry in Zhejiang province, the People's Republic of China. The company provides property management services to 33 properties, including 16 residential properties and 17 non-residential properties. It offers property management services, including security, cleaning, gardening, repair, and maintenance of common areas and common facilities and ancillary services; value-added services to non-property owners, primarily property developers, including consulting services, sales assistance services, and pre-delivery services; and community value-added services to property owners and residents, including property repair and maintenance, waste cleaning, utility fee collection, remodeling, and decoration and community space services, as well as engages in hotel and long-term rental apartment businesses. The company was formerly known as SUNDY HUIDU LIMITED and changed its name to Sundy Service Group Co. Ltd in September 2017. Sundy Service Group Co. Ltd was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, the People's Republic of China.
